description.content: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Trigger and manage data reloads for apps to refresh data from connected sources.
Finds and returns reload records for a specific app. The appId query parameter is required.

query.description: (Required) The identifier of the app to list reloads for.
SCIM filter expression for advanced filtering of reload records.
Maximum number of reload records to return.
When true, includes the script log in the response.
Cursor for the next page of results.
Cursor for the previous page of results.
When true, returns partial reload information.

description.content: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
The name of your Qlik Cloud tenant
The region of your Qlik Cloud deployment (This can only be one of us,eu,ap,uk)

REST API for Qlik Cloud platform services including apps, spaces, and reloads. Provides programmatic access to manage analytics applications, organize resources into spaces with access control, and trigger data reloads. Authentication is performed via OAuth 2.0 bearer tokens or API keys issued from a Qlik Cloud tenant.

Contact Support:
 Name: Qlik Developer Relations
 Email: developer@qlik.com
